'''Galvoni III''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds']] [[Galvoni system/Legends|Galvoni system]] with a military communications complex.

Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] infiltrated the [[Imperial Records Office/Legends|Imperial Records Office]] to gather information about the construction, function, personnel and destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].

{{Planet-stub}}
